overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian industrial district with massive elevated highways, neon-lit overpasses, and futuristic skyscrapers in the background. The character navigates through asphalt streets and pedestrian walkways beneath heavy industrial infrastructure with scattered pedestrians and light vehicle traffic.

events.description: pedestrian in red outfit walks past camera from right to left
moving from covered area toward more open intersection with increased sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward beneath the elevated highway, navigating around pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear jogging past the camera toward the background
man in white jacket standing near utility barrels on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support pillars
gray industrial building with metal siding and small windows
tall palm tree growing from sidewalk island in the street
yellow industrial crane framework visible in the distance
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in an industrial district. The character walks forward on asphalt pavement, passing pedestrians including a jogger in red. Industrial buildings line the left side while yellow crane structures are visible in the distance. The lighting is mixed with natural sunlight filtering through the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection approach with neon-lit elevated highways

events.description: white sedan drives past on the right side of the street
camera turns slightly right to navigate toward the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while approaching an intersection, observing the traffic and surroundings

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street parallel to the character

entered.detail: elevated highway structure illuminated with red neon lights underneath
large cylindrical industrial chimney with metal framework
tall futuristic glass skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves from under the overpass toward a more open intersection. Red neon-lit elevated highways dominate the view ahead, with industrial smokestacks on the right. A white sedan passes by on the street. The skyscrapers of the city center become visible in the distance as the camera turns slightly to navigate the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major industrial intersection with multiple elevated highway levels

events.description: camera looks upward to view the neon-lit elevated highway structures overhead
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection including a black sedan

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection while looking up at the massive industrial architecture and neon lights

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large holographic advertisement display near the top
large industrial building with corrugated metal walls and pipes

segments.scene_description: At the wide intersection, the character looks up at the massive neon-lit elevated highways crisscrossing overhead. The view opens to reveal a holographic skyscraper in the distance. Vehicles including a black sedan pass through the intersection. The camera turns left then continues forward, revealing more of the industrial warehouse district.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with elevated highway overhead and vehicle traffic

events.description: white car drives past on the right side of the street
approaching pedestrian walkway ramp with metal railings on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial street, passing parked vehicles and approaching a pedestrian walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete ramp leading up to elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings
silver metal guardrail along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the industrial street beneath the elevated highway, passing a white car on the right. The neon-lit bridge structure remains overhead. The character approaches and begins to ascend a pedestrian walkway ramp with metal safety railings, transitioning from the street level to an elevated pedestrian path.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between industrial buildings and highway

events.description: fully entered the elevated pedestrian walkway with railings on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated concrete walkway, following a pedestrian ahead toward the distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead on the pedestrian path

entered.detail: elevated concrete pedestrian path with yellow support beams overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings on the left and industrial buildings on the right. The character walks on concrete pavement beneath the massive elevated highway structure, following another pedestrian toward the distant skyscrapers. The environment is more enclosed and separated from the street traffic below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an industrial overpass into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where the character walks along asphalt pavement past a jogger in red, with sunlight filtering through the heavy concrete structure and yellow cranes visible in the distance. As the character moves forward, the environment opens up into a bustling intersection where red neon-lit highways dominate the skyline and industrial smokestacks rise to the right. The scene then expands further as the camera turns to reveal the distant skyscrapers of the city center and a towering holographic building. Finally, the view shifts past passing sedans to look upward at the crisscrossing overhead highways before turning left to reveal the sprawling industrial warehouse district.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a street-level industrial road to an enclosed elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins with the character walking along an asphalt street beneath a neon-lit highway bridge, passing a white car on the right. As the character moves forward, the camera follows them ascending a ramp with metal safety railings, shifting the perspective from the road to a higher vantage point. The scene then opens onto a concrete pedestrian path where the environment becomes more enclosed by industrial buildings on the right and the massive highway structure overhead. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they follow another pedestrian toward a distant skyline of futuristic skyscrapers.
